description: Large pothole on Sector 7 main road near Metro station, approximately 15cm deep. Car-sized. High vehicle traffic area. Causing severe damage to vehicles.
Pipeline burst causing water accumulation on the road. Sewage water visible. Strong smell. Blocking pedestrian pathway.
address: Sector 9, near Shyam Nagar Road, Ghaziabad

description: Streetlight pole damaged with exposed wiring. Electric shock risk. Three poles in a row non-functional since last week. Area pitch dark at night.
notes: Exposed electrical wiring is an immediate safety risk

description: Garbage has accumulated for 5 days at this spot. Municipal trucks not collecting. Foul smell, breeding mosquitoes. Near residential colony.
address: NH-119 Corridor, near Vasundhara crossing, Ghaziabad
notes: Monsoon season makes this a health hazard

description: Small pothole on the side road. Cosmetic damage only. No immediate safety concern. Road still passable without issues.
Major water logging due to blocked drainage. Entire road flooded up to knee level. Emergency vehicles cannot pass. Monsoon rains making it worse.
